name: Breast MRI
description: Breast MRI with contrast for breast cancer screening and evaluation

findings.technique: Bilateral breast MRI was performed with T1, T2, and dynamic contrast sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Right Breast
sections.content: Right breast [no mass / no enhancement / no suspicious findings]. No abnormal non-mass enhancement.

sections.name: Left Breast
sections.content: Left breast [no mass / no enhancement / no suspicious findings]. No abnormal non-mass enhancement.

sections.name: Axillae
sections.content: Axillary lymph nodes [are not enlarged / no pathologic nodes] bilaterally.

sections.name: Background Parenchymal Enhancement
sections.content: Background parenchymal enhancement [is minimal / not significant].

impression:
1. No suspicious enhancement or masses in either breast.
2. No abnormal axillary lymph nodes.
3. Normal breast MRI.
